name: Chunky Garden Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1 med tomato, Cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the tomato sauce, olive oil, vinegar, and honey.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients: celery, garlic, cucumber, scallion, tomato cubes, hot pepper sauce, black pepper, and sweet red pepper.
3. Serve chilled. Top each serving with one of the garnishes listed below (optional).
4. Garnish options include herbed garlic croutons, a dollop of plain yogurt, finely minced fresh chives, shredded lettuce, or minced parsley.
Makes 4-6 servings.
Variations: Add 2 tablespoons chopped fresh mint leaves and omit hot pepper sauce. Serve with a substantial salad and/or cheese platter.
